items.title_zh: 总部位于伦敦的教育科技初创公司 Multiverse 以 2.1 亿美元的估值从 Index 和其他公司筹集了 7000 万美元，以进军人工智能培训领域；它在一月份收购了 StackFuel（Kieran Smith/金融时报）
items.title_bilingual: 总部位于伦敦的教育科技初创公司 Multiverse 以 2.1 亿美元的估值从 Index 和其他公司筹集了 7000 万美元，以进军人工智能培训领域；它在一月份收购了 StackFuel（Kieran Smith/金融时报） / London-based edtech startup Multiverse raised $70M at a $2.1B valuation from Index and others as it pushes into AI training; it acquired StackFuel in January (Kieran Smith/Financial Times)

items.title: Alphabet sold $3.6B of bonds in its debut yen-denominated bond sale, the largest by a non-Japanese company, as AI-driven capital spending accelerates (Atsuko Fukase/Bloomberg)
items.title_original: Alphabet sold $3.6B of bonds in its debut yen-denominated bond sale, the largest by a non-Japanese company, as AI-driven capital spending accelerates (Atsuko Fukase/Bloomberg)
items.title_en: Alphabet sold $3.6B of bonds in its debut yen-denominated bond sale, the largest by a non-Japanese company, as AI-driven capital spending accelerates (Atsuko Fukase/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 随着人工智能驱动的资本支出加速，Alphabet 在首次日元计价债券发行中出售了 3.6B 美元的债券，这是非日本公司规模最大的一次债券发行（Atsuko Fukase/彭博社）
items.title_bilingual: 随着人工智能驱动的资本支出加速，Alphabet 在首次日元计价债券发行中出售了 3.6B 美元的债券，这是非日本公司规模最大的一次债券发行（Atsuko Fukase/彭博社） / Alphabet sold $3.6B of bonds in its debut yen-denominated bond sale, the largest by a non-Japanese company, as AI-driven capital spending accelerates (Atsuko Fukase/Bloomberg)
